tools.name: open_session
tools.description: Open a working session by id, entering the active phase.

tools.name: close_session
tools.description: Close a session; returns to the setup phase when none remain.

tools.name: run_batch
tools.description: Run a batch of operations described by a manifest in one call.

tools.name: describe_item
tools.description: Describe an item's entries, fields and relations.

tools.name: get_item_diagram
tools.description: Return a diagram of the item's entries and relations.

tools.name: list_entries
tools.description: List entries (fields, measures, metrics) defined in an item.

tools.name: find_entries
tools.description: Search entries in an item by free-text query across names and descriptions.

tools.name: explain_entry
tools.description: Explain the lineage of an entry: the composition chain down to underlying sources and columns.

tools.name: run_query
tools.description: Compile and execute a query against the active item, returning SQL and results.

tools.name: list_examples
tools.description: List canonical example queries authored alongside the item.

tools.name: get_example
tools.description: Get a single example query by name with its payload and compiled SQL preview.

tools.name: get_dependency_graph
tools.description: Get the item's entry dependency graph.

tools.name: get_relation_graph
tools.description: Get the item's source relation graph.

tools.name: query_graph
tools.description: Query the item graph using a graph-query expression.

tools.name: list_items
tools.description: List items currently open in the session.
